summary.lv: AGCSOFT SIA meklē Chief Product Officer (CPO), kurš vadīs uzņēmuma produktu stratēģiju un komandu IT risinājumu izstrādē. Atalgojums €7230 mēnesī.
summary.en: AGCSOFT SIA is seeking a Chief Product Officer (CPO) to lead the company's product strategy and team in the IT solutions development space, offering €7,230/month.
